title: lapis lazuli armor and tools
description: Lapis Lazuli Armor and Tools are custom blue gear made from Lapis. You can craft full armor and tools using Lapis instead of metals. They have moderate durability, decent protection, and look great in a rich blue color—perfect for stylish adventurers!
body:
🔷 Lapis Lazuli Armor and Tools – Full Description
Step into the world of magic and mining with Lapis Lazuli Armor and Tools — a custom gear set that transforms one of Minecraft’s most enchanting materials into powerful equipment. Now, Lapis isn’t just for enchanting tables — it’s your new go-to for stylish protection and reliable tools.

🛡️ Armor
Craft a full set of armor — Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots — using Lapis Lazuli.

Color: Deep, glowing lapis blue

Durability: Similar to Iron, but with better enchantability

Protection: Balanced between Iron and Gold

Bonus Effects (optional):

Increases experience gain

Boosts enchantment strength when worn


🛠️ Tools
Mine, fight, and build with the full Lapis tool set: Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe.

Efficiency: Comparable to Iron tools

Enchantability: High, like Gold

Special Traits (optional):

Extra drops from ores

Emits particles or light when used

Increased luck or Fortune chance

🔨 Crafting
Use regular crafting recipes, replacing Iron or Diamond with Lapis Lazuli.
Example:

3 Lapis + 2 Sticks = Lapis Pickaxe

8 Lapis = Lapis Chestplate

✨ Why Use Lapis Gear?
A fresh visual style with glowing blue armor

Balanced power for mid-game use

High enchant potential for magical builds and combat

A great use for all that extra Lapis!
